description:
Load guides and styles for working with .pen files.

- guide: Task-specific instructions that teach you how to perform a task correctly.
- style: Visual style archetypes with configurable fonts, colors, and imagery.

Usage:
1. get_guidelines(): list available guides and styles
2. get_guidelines({ category, name }): load guide with no params or get required params when required 
3. get_guidelines({ category, name, params }): load guide or style

name.description: Guideline name from the category listing

params.description: Key-value pairs for required params returned in step 2

name: get_guidelines
